items.question: When does fetch reject its Promise?
items.explanation: HTTP error statuses still resolve; check res.ok.

items.question: What must you set to send a JSON POST body?
options: Content-Type: application/json and JSON.stringify the body
items.answer: Content-Type: application/json and JSON.stringify the body
items.explanation: The server needs the content type and a stringified payload.

items.question: How do you add a timeout to fetch?
items.explanation: fetch has no built-in timeout; AbortController cancels it.

items.question: What does res.json() return?
options: a Promise of the parsed body
items.answer: a Promise of the parsed body
